To know about the product labelling of the scheme investors should refer to the front page of 
initial offering application forms, Key Information Memorandum (KIM) and Scheme Information 
Documents (SIDs, Common application form – along with the information about the scheme, 
and Scheme advertisements. 
However, investors should consult their financial advisers if they are not clear about the 
suitability of the product.
